final:
module top_module(
    input a,
    input b,
    input deassert,
    output reg out
);always @(a, b, deassert) begin
    if (deassert == 1'b0) begin
        out <= 1'b0; // deassert signal is asserted, output is 0
    end
    else begin
        out <= a & b; // deassert signal is de-asserted, output is AND of a and b
    end
end

endmodule
